author: anon-13168fa2
content: Removed the redundant portfolio/ wrapper. 00-foundations/04-your-workspace.md no longer creates ~/guild-projects/portfolio/; the novice creates only ~/guild-projects/scratch/ and the portfolio repo gets cloned directly into ~/guild-projects/guild-portfolio/ in chapter 05. Updated the verification checklist in ch 04 to match. Updated 00-foundations/05-git-just-enough.md clone command (cd ~/guild-projects before git clone) and the git init example (uses scratch/ instead of the now-nonexistent portfolio/). Updated 01-talking-to-agents/05-first-build.md (two cd commands) and 02-the-methodology/02-tracking-your-work.md (one cd command) to use the flatter path. Verified no remaining 'guild-projects/portfolio' references.
